title: Finding the Sweet Spot: Square Mile Sweet Shop Espresso Recipe Exploration
summary: Exploring how different espresso ratios affect flavour expression, balance, and extraction characteristics in Square Mile Sweet Shop coffee.
question: Which espresso ratio best represents the flavour profile of Sweet Shop coffee?
hypothesis: Different brew ratios will emphasise different characteristics of the coffee. Longer ratios may increase clarity and fruit expression, while shorter ratios may increase body and intensity.
limitations: Extraction time alone does not represent full extraction quality.
Puck preparation consistency may influence results.
next_steps: Compare results and identify the recipe that best represents Sweet Shop's intended flavour profile.
